title: Silver Nickel Plated Steel Safety Pins in Assorted Sizes, Pack of 50 - Durable & Stylish Design, Perfect for Sewing, Quilting & Crafts
features: VERSATILE ASSORTMENT: Our pack of assorted safety pins offers a variety of 50 pins in different sizes, making it the perfect option for all your pinning needs. From tiny beads to securing layers of fabric, these pins have got you covered.

ROBUST CONSTRUCTION: Made with premium quality nickel-plated steel, these safety pins are designed to resist bending or breaking, ensuring longevity and reliability for your projects. You can trust these pins to withstand even the toughest materials.
SECURE FASTENING: Our safety pins are equipped with a strong closure mechanism that clasps securely and stays in place, giving you peace of mind that whatever you're attaching, it's held firmly.

MULTIPURPOSE USE: These safety pins are not just limited to sewing and crafting. They can also be used as a quick fix for wardrobe malfunctions, emergency repairs around the house, and even as DIY jewelry clasps.

CRAFT IN STYLE: Not only are these safety pins sturdy and functional, but they also boast a sleek and stylish design. The silver finish adds a touch of elegance to your creative endeavors, making them perfect for both practical and decorative purposes
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality pack of safety pins are constructed from nickle coated steel and contains fifty individual safety pins. Safety Warning No warning applicable
